title: Death Stands Above Me, Whispering Low
content:
Death stands above me, whispering low
I know not what into my ear:
Of his strange language all I know
Is, there is not a word of fear.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Walter Savage Landor, titled "Death Stands Above Me, Whispering Low", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
